design_philosophy.core_loop: Rotate and flip cube blocks to match patterns; clear completed formations to progress through stages
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Time pressure and spatial reasoning—players must visualize cube orientations and make quick decisions before pieces settle
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Become a master puzzle solver through pattern recognition and quick reflexes
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Puzzle game that emphasizes cube manipulation mechanics as its central identity; arcade roots suggest fast-paced, arcade-style difficulty scaling rather than contemplative puzzle solving

difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based progression with hidden level select available via cheat code
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Hidden stage select allows skilled players to skip ahead or practice specific difficulty spikes

progression.unlock_mechanism: Stage completion unlocks next stage sequentially
replayability_hooks: Hidden level select for practicing individual stages
Arcade port suggests score-chasing across multiple playthroughs
